title.description: Heading for the page showing PREreviews.

titleWithDetails.description: Heading for the page showing PREreviews, with details about the filter applied.

pageNumber.description: Label for the page number in the list of PREreviews.

skipResults.description: Link to skip the page header and go directly to the list of PREreviews.

filterTitle.description: Heading for the section showing the filters for the list of PREreviews.

filterTitleAuthorLabel.description: Label for the text field to filter the list of PREreviews by keyword, title or author.

filterLanguageLabel.description: Label for the dropdown to filter the list of PREreviews by language.

filterLanguageAny.description: Option in the dropdown to filter the list of PREreviews by language.

filterFieldLabel.description: Label for the dropdown to filter the list of PREreviews by field.

filterFieldAny.description: Option in the dropdown to filter the list of PREreviews by field.

filterButton.description: Button to apply the filters to the list of PREreviews.

pagerNewer.description: Label for the link to the page containing newer PREreviews.

pagerOlder.description: Label for the link to the page containing older PREreviews.

noResults.message: No PREreviews have been published yet.
noResults.description: Text shown when there are no PREreviews to show.

appearHere.message: When they do, they’ll appear here.
appearHere.description: Text shown when there are no PREreviews to show, indicating that they will appear here once published.

havingProblems.description: Heading of the page when we’re unable to show the list of PREreviews.

unableToShow.message: We’re unable to show this page of recent PREreviews now.
unableToShow.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.

tryAgainLater.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.
